SRC-0001.title: California Secretary of State Statements of Information Filing Tips

SRC-0003.title: California Privacy Protection Agency Laws and Regulations

SRC-0005.title: Cal/OSHA Division of Occupational Safety and Health

jurisdictions.name: California Entity Records
jurisdictions.role: entity qualification, status, and statement-of-information authority

governing_law.basis: California entity maintenance and statement-of-information routing are anchored to Secretary of State guidance in SRC-0001.

forum.basis: California entity record, status, filing confirmation, public disclosure, and business-search questions route through the Secretary of State source in SRC-0001.

tax.basis: SRC-0001 states failure to file the required Statement of Information may result in Franchise Tax Board penalties and suspension or forfeiture, linking the entity-record lane to tax-status control.

licenses.basis: Entity record maintenance, public company disclosure statements, certified copies, and certificate orders route through the Secretary of State filing lane in SRC-0001.

filings.basis: Statements of Information, Common Interest Development Statements, and Publicly Traded Disclosure Statements can be filed online through the Secretary of State lane described in SRC-0001.

deadlines.due: Six-month statutory filing window tied to month of incorporation, registration, formation, or conversion
deadlines.desc: Use the Secretary of State six-month filing window chart to calendar recurring Statement of Information periods.

deadlines.due: Upon information change between statutory filing periods
deadlines.desc: Updated statements should be filed when information changes between statutory filing periods.

jurisdictions.name: California Franchise and Income Tax
jurisdictions.role: corporate franchise-tax, income-tax, and suspension-control authority

governing_law.basis: California corporate tax posture for domestic, foreign, registered, and doing-business corporations is routed to FTB corporation guidance in SRC-0002.

forum.basis: California tax return, minimum franchise tax, extension, suspension, and dissolution or surrender issues route through the FTB source in SRC-0002.

tax.basis: SRC-0002 states every corporation incorporated, registered, or doing business in California must pay the minimum franchise tax, subject to the stated first-year and short-year exceptions.

licenses.basis: SRC-0002 ties corporation active status to filing the Statement of Information and filing and paying state income taxes; operating licenses remain routed by business activity.

filings.basis: California corporation return, estimated tax, extension payment, final return, and dissolution or surrender steps are mapped to the FTB source in SRC-0002.

deadlines.due: Original corporation return and estimated-tax due date from FTB due-date tables
deadlines.desc: Calendar corporation filing and payment dates from the FTB business due-date lane linked in SRC-0002.

deadlines.due: Automatic extension period from FTB corporation guidance
deadlines.desc: Apply the FTB automatic extension period while treating payment as due on the original date because SRC-0002 states the extension to file is not an extension to pay.

jurisdictions.name: California Privacy and Data Broker Compliance
jurisdictions.role: CCPA, CPRA, Delete Act, data-broker, privacy-regulation, and enforcement authority

governing_law.basis: California privacy compliance routes to the CPPA laws and regulations source in SRC-0003, including CCPA, Proposition 24, and Delete Act materials.

forum.basis: CPPA rulemaking, enforcement posture, data-broker registration, consumer complaint, and privacy regulatory questions route through SRC-0003.

tax.basis: SRC-0003 is a privacy and data-broker authority; California tax issues route to SRC-0002.

licenses.basis: Data broker registration, accessible deletion mechanism duties, cybersecurity audits, risk assessments, ADMT regulations, and CCPA updates route to CPPA materials in SRC-0003.

filings.basis: Data-broker registration, consumer rights process support, DROP compliance, and privacy documentation workflows route through SRC-0003.

deadlines.due: January 1, 2026 effective-law lane for CCPA and Delete Act materials
deadlines.desc: Use the CPPA source to calendar CCPA, Delete Act, and data-broker regulation effective-date controls.
Calendar CPPA rulemaking, completed package, preliminary activity, and registration obligations from the dated CPPA materials in SRC-0003.

jurisdictions.name: California Labor Standards
jurisdictions.role: wage, retaliation, posting, registration, and labor-law enforcement authority

governing_law.basis: California wage, break, retaliation, posting, registration, and labor-law enforcement work routes to the Labor Commissioner's Office source in SRC-0004.

forum.basis: Wage claim, retaliation, labor-law violation, judgment enforcement, BOFE, public works, and Labor Commissioner proceeding issues route through SRC-0004.

tax.basis: Payroll-tax and wage-statement tie-outs must reconcile labor-standard classifications and wage obligations from SRC-0004 to the owning payroll and tax seats.

licenses.basis: California labor registrations, workplace postings, training, public works, and registration services are mapped to the Labor Commissioner lane in SRC-0004.

filings.basis: Workplace rights notice, wage claim, retaliation complaint, labor-law violation report, and registration-service workflows route through SRC-0004.

deadlines.due: February 1 annually for workplace rights notice duty
deadlines.desc: SRC-0004 states employers must provide the workplace rights notice on or before February 1, 2026, and each year after that.

jurisdictions.name: California Workplace Safety
jurisdictions.role: Cal/OSHA workplace safety, permits, reporting, and enforcement authority

governing_law.basis: Workplace safety and health obligations route to Cal/OSHA authority in SRC-0005.

forum.basis: Cal/OSHA inspection, citation, appeal, complaint, employer reporting, consultation, permit, and registration issues route through SRC-0005.

tax.basis: SRC-0005 is a workplace safety source; tax and payroll issues route to SRC-0002 or the payroll tax seat after intake.

licenses.basis: Cal/OSHA permits, registrations, certifications, licenses, required notifications, postings, and recordkeeping are mapped to SRC-0005.

filings.basis: Employer accident reporting, workplace safety complaints, appeals, recordkeeping, required notifications, and permit workflows route through SRC-0005.

deadlines.due: Event-triggered employer reporting and recordkeeping deadlines
deadlines.desc: Calendar workplace accident reporting, postings, notifications, recordkeeping, and permit deadlines from the Cal/OSHA employer lanes in SRC-0005.
